# sf-deck v0.1.1

This patch release corrects the public contract for the read-only
`object describe` command.

## Fixed

- The documented command now works:

  ```sh
  sf-deck object describe \
    --org <alias> \
    --sobject Account \
    --json
  ```

- The earlier `--name` spelling remains supported for compatibility.
- Supplying different values to `--name` and `--sobject` now returns
  an `invalid_argument` error instead of choosing one silently.
- Successful and failed `object describe` responses now report the
  command as `object.describe`, matching the verb registry and
  generated documentation.

There are no data-model, safety-policy, authentication, or write-path
changes in this release.

## Install or upgrade

```sh
brew upgrade --cask Jacob-Stokes/tap/sf-deck
```

New installations:

```sh
brew install --cask Jacob-Stokes/tap/sf-deck
```
